message:
feat: add stop.sh hook (flushes AssistantTurn with transcript parsing)

Parses transcript JSONL from last known line, groups assistant entries by
message.id to aggregate text/reasoning/usage across multiple API calls per
turn, then writes one AssistantTurn cxdb ConversationItem. Appends a
session-end SystemMessage when stop reason is end_turn/max_turns with no
pending tool calls. Increments turn_number and clears tool_calls on flush.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,220 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# stop.sh — Stop hook (synchronous)
+# Fires at the end of every turn. Parses transcript for the current turn's
+# assistant text and metrics, then flushes buffered tool calls as one AssistantTurn.
+#
+# TRANSCRIPT FORMAT (discovered via _probe-stop.sh):
+#   type=assistant entries; grouped by message.id (one group = one API call).
+#   Multiple API calls per turn. Usage from last entry per group. Sum across groups.
+set -euo pipefail
+
+source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+resolve_cxdb_url
+
+input=$(cat)
+session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id')
+context_id=$(get_context_id "$session_id")
+[ -z "$context_id" ] && exit 0
+
+reason=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.reason // ""')
+ts=$(now_ms)
+turn_number=$(get_turn_number "$session_id")
+tool_calls=$(get_tool_calls "$session_id")
+transcript_path=$(get_transcript_path "$session_id")
+start_line=$(get_transcript_line_count "$session_id")
+
+# ---- Parse transcript for this turn's assistant text and metrics ----
+assistant_text=""
+reasoning_text=""
+input_tokens=0
+output_tokens=0
+cached_tokens=0
+model_name=""
+new_line_count="$start_line"
+
+if [ -n "$transcript_path" ] && [ -f "$transcript_path" ]; then
+  transcript_data=$(python3 - "$transcript_path" "$start_line" <<'PYEOF'
+import sys, json
+
+transcript_path = sys.argv[1]
+start_line = int(sys.argv[2])
+
+text_parts = []
+reasoning_parts = []
+total_input = 0
+total_output = 0
+total_cache_create = 0
+total_cache_read = 0
+model_name = ""
+
+current_group_id = None
+current_group_text = []
+current_group_reasoning = []
+current_group_last_usage = {}
+group_count = 0
+
+line_count = 0
+
+try:
+    with open(transcript_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
+        for lineno, line in enumerate(f, 1):
+            line_count = lineno
+            if lineno <= start_line:
+                continue
+            line = line.strip()
+            if not line:
+                continue
+            try:
+                obj = json.loads(line)
+            except json.JSONDecodeError:
+                continue
+
+            if obj.get('type') != 'assistant':
+                continue
+
+            msg = obj.get('message', {})
+            msg_id = msg.get('id', '')
+            if not model_name:
+                model_name = msg.get('model', '')
+
+            if msg_id != current_group_id:
+                # Commit previous group
+                if current_group_id is not None:
+                    text_parts.extend(current_group_text)
+                    reasoning_parts.extend(current_group_reasoning)
+                    u = current_group_last_usage
+                    total_input += u.get('input_tokens', 0)
+                    total_output += u.get('output_tokens', 0)
+                    total_cache_create += u.get('cache_creation_input_tokens', 0)
+                    total_cache_read += u.get('cache_read_input_tokens', 0)
+                # Start new group
+                current_group_id = msg_id
+                current_group_text = []
+                current_group_reasoning = []
+                current_group_last_usage = {}
+                group_count += 1
+
+            # Accumulate content
+            for block in msg.get('content', []):
+                if block.get('type') == 'text':
+                    current_group_text.append(block.get('text', ''))
+                elif block.get('type') == 'thinking':
+                    current_group_reasoning.append(block.get('thinking', ''))
+            # Keep updating last usage (last entry in group has final output_tokens)
+            current_group_last_usage = msg.get('usage', {})
+
+    # Commit final group
+    if current_group_id is not None:
+        text_parts.extend(current_group_text)
+        reasoning_parts.extend(current_group_reasoning)
+        u = current_group_last_usage
+        total_input += u.get('input_tokens', 0)
+        total_output += u.get('output_tokens', 0)
+        total_cache_create += u.get('cache_creation_input_tokens', 0)
+        total_cache_read += u.get('cache_read_input_tokens', 0)
+
+except Exception:
+    pass
+
+result = {
+    "text": "".join(text_parts),
+    "reasoning": "".join(reasoning_parts),
+    "input_tokens": total_input,
+    "output_tokens": total_output,
+    "cached_tokens": total_cache_create + total_cache_read,
+    "model": model_name,
+    "line_count": line_count
+}
+print(json.dumps(result))
+PYEOF
+  2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
+
+  assistant_text=$(echo "$transcript_data" | jq -r '.text // ""')
+  reasoning_text=$(echo "$transcript_data" | jq -r '.reasoning // ""')
+  input_tokens=$(echo "$transcript_data" | jq '.input_tokens // 0')
+  output_tokens=$(echo "$transcript_data" | jq '.output_tokens // 0')
+  cached_tokens=$(echo "$transcript_data" | jq '.cached_tokens // 0')
+  model_name=$(echo "$transcript_data" | jq -r '.model // ""')
+  new_line_count=$(echo "$transcript_data" | jq -r '.line_count // 0')
+fi
+
+# ---- Update transcript_line_count in state ----
+state_now=$(read_state "$session_id")
+if [ -n "$state_now" ] && [ "$new_line_count" != "$start_line" ]; then
+  updated=$(echo "$state_now" | jq --argjson lc "$new_line_count" '.transcript_line_count = $lc') || true
+  [ -n "$updated" ] && write_state "$session_id" "$updated"
+fi
+
+# ---- Build and append AssistantTurn ----
+metrics=$(jq -n \
+  --argjson input_tokens "$input_tokens" \
+  --argjson output_tokens "$output_tokens" \
+  --argjson cached_tokens "$cached_tokens" \
+  --arg model "$model_name" \
+  '{
+    "input_tokens": $input_tokens,
+    "output_tokens": $output_tokens,
+    "total_tokens": ($input_tokens + $output_tokens),
+    "cached_tokens": $cached_tokens,
+    "model": $model
+  }')
+
+turn_payload=$(jq -n \
+  --arg text "$assistant_text" \
+  --arg reasoning "$reasoning_text" \
+  --argjson tool_calls "$tool_calls" \
+  --argjson metrics "$metrics" \
+  --argjson turn_number "$turn_number" \
+  --arg finish_reason "$reason" \
+  --argjson ts "$ts" \
+  '{
+    "type_id": "cxdb.ConversationItem",
+    "type_version": 3,
+    "data": {
+      "item_type": "assistant_turn",
+      "status": "complete",
+      "timestamp": $ts,
+      "turn": {
+        "text": $text,
+        "tool_calls": $tool_calls,
+        "reasoning": $reasoning,
+        "metrics": $metrics,
+        "agent": "claude-code",
+        "turn_number": $turn_number,
+        "finish_reason": $finish_reason
+      }
+    }
+  }')
+
+cxdb_append "$context_id" "$turn_payload"
+
+# ---- Append session-end SystemMessage on final stop ----
+# "end_turn" or "max_turns" with no pending tool calls = final stop.
+if [ "$reason" = "end_turn" ] || [ "$reason" = "max_turns" ]; then
+  tool_count=$(echo "$tool_calls" | jq 'length')
+  if [ "$tool_count" = "0" ]; then
+    end_payload=$(jq -n \
+      --arg reason "$reason" \
+      --argjson ts "$ts" \
+      '{
+        "type_id": "cxdb.ConversationItem",
+        "type_version": 3,
+        "data": {
+          "item_type": "system",
+          "status": "complete",
+          "timestamp": $ts,
+          "system": {
+            "kind": "info",
+            "title": "Session Ended",
+            "content": ("Stop reason: " + $reason)
+          }
+        }
+      }')
+    cxdb_append "$context_id" "$end_payload"
+  fi
+fi
+
+# ---- Flush: increment turn_number, clear tool_calls ----
+flush_turn "$session_id" || true
+
+exit 0
